content.full_text:
October 27, 2003

Roy A. Hanley, City Attorney
Municipal Advocates Group, LLP
1104-B Vine Street
Paso Robles, CA 93446

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-164

Dear Mr. Hanley:

This letter is in response to your July 16, 2003, request for advice on behalf of Jerry L. Clay, Sr. regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Because the question posed in this letter is identical to the question answered by the Hanley Advice Letter, No. A-03-196, dated September 22, 2003, we are withdrawing the July 16, 2003, request for advice. A copy of Advice Letter No. A-03-196 is enclosed for your reference.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

Enc.
HBA:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-03-164

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
